company_legal_standing.legal_form: Società a responsabilità limitata (S.r.l.) – equivalent to French SARL
exclusion_grounds_checked: No criminal convictions (corruption, fraud, money laundering, terrorist financing)
No outstanding tax or social security irregularities
Not subject to insolvency or liquidation proceedings

subcontracting_policy.subcontractor_vetting_process: Legal and financial due diligence + exclusion grounds check

intellectual_property.default_ip_model: Work-for-hire – all deliverables transferred to client upon final payment
intellectual_property.client_data_ownership: All client data remains sole property of the contracting authority

standard_contractual_clauses.price_revision_mechanism: Annual indexation capped at official national index, max 3% per year

gdpr_legal_instruments.standard_legal_basis: Article 6(1)(e) – performance of task in public interest
gdpr_legal_instruments.note: Intra-EU operations only – no SCCs or adequacy decisions required

typical_legal_risks_monitored: Open-source licence compliance (Apache 2.0, MIT – cleared for commercial use)
Cross-border data flow (intra-EU only – no issue)
AI Act compliance evolution (limited-risk classification – monitoring updates)
Vendor lock-in mitigation (source code escrow + open standards)
